recommendations.title: Platoon
recommendations.overview: As a young and naive recruit in Vietnam, Chris Taylor faces a moral crisis when confronted with the horrors of war and the duality of man.

recommendations.title: Appropriate Behavior
recommendations.overview: Shirin is struggling to become an ideal Persian daughter, politically correct bisexual and hip young Brooklynite but fails miserably in her attempt at all identities.

recommendations.title: Captain Corelli's Mandolin
recommendations.overview: When a fisherman leaves to fight with the Greek army during World War II, his fiancée falls in love with the local Italian commander.

recommendations.title: Alexander
recommendations.genres: War, History, Action, Adventure, Drama, Romance
recommendations.overview: Alexander, the King of Macedonia, leads his legions against the giant Persian Empire. After defeating the Persians, he leads his army across the then known world, venturing farther than any westerner had ever gone, all the way to India.

recommendations.title: Ghost Recon: Alpha
recommendations.overview: Ghost Recon: Alpha sees a team led by Ghost Leader infiltrate a trade at a Russian depot between a general and a mysterious other figure.

recommendations.title: Jarhead
recommendations.overview: Jarhead is a film about a US Marine Anthony Swofford’s experience in the Gulf War. After putting up with an arduous boot camp, Swofford and his unit are sent to the Persian Gulf where they are eager to fight, but are forced to stay back from the acti

recommendations.title: The General
recommendations.overview: During America’s Civil War, Union spies steal engineer Johnny Gray's beloved locomotive, 'The General'—with Johnnie's lady love aboard an attached boxcar—and he single-handedly must do all in his power to both get The General back and to rescue Annab

recommendations.title: Devotion
recommendations.overview: The harrowing true story of two elite US Navy fighter pilots during the Korean War. Their heroic sacrifices would ultimately make them the Navy's most celebrated wingmen.

recommendations.title: Where Eagles Dare
